hyperedges.label: Spec + Plan + Build Log form the Session Continuity Protocol
Journey Designer → Engagement Studio → Team Builder share Zustand state
Understand / Engineer / Operate form the master IA

nodes.label: BUG-001 Tailwind v4 border-border Syntax Error
nodes.norm_label: bug-001 tailwind v4 border-border syntax error

nodes.label: BUG-002 shadcn/ui Overwrote Brand HSL Tokens
nodes.norm_label: bug-002 shadcn/ui overwrote brand hsl tokens

nodes.norm_label: bug-003 footer img onerror state update error

nodes.label: Platform Vision: Cybersecurity Delivery & Engineering Platform
nodes.rationale: Mitigence aims to redefine the cybersecurity digital experience from a static marketing site to an interactive gateway where organizations discover, configure, and engage services
nodes.norm_label: platform vision: cybersecurity delivery & engineering platform

nodes.label: Three Platform Pillars: Discover / Design / Deliver
nodes.rationale: Every platform decision is anchored to three interconnected pillars: Discover (education), Design (configuration), Deliver (transparency)
nodes.norm_label: three platform pillars: discover / design / deliver

nodes.label: Core Experience Model: Understand / Engineer / Operate
nodes.rationale: Renamed from Discover/Design/Deliver to align with cybersecurity lifecycle terminology and customer mental model
nodes.norm_label: core experience model: understand / engineer / operate

nodes.label: Homepage Information Hierarchy (13 sections)
nodes.rationale: Services appear late or not at all — delivery and journey are the product

nodes.label: Interactive Enterprise Map — Module 1
nodes.rationale: Signature homepage visual; 12-node animated SVG showing enterprise attack surface with hover/click interactions

nodes.label: Engagement Studio — Module 3
nodes.rationale: 5-stage planning workspace; replaces traditional quote request; digital consultant concept

nodes.label: Security Journey Designer — Module 2
nodes.rationale: Maturity-based journey planner; pre-populates Engagement Studio via Zustand

nodes.label: Team Builder — Module 6
nodes.rationale: Capability pod assembly; shows delivery model, timeline, deliverables dynamically

nodes.label: Capability Explorer — Module 4
nodes.rationale: 8 security domains; engineering lifecycle drill-down per domain; renamed from Technology Explorer

nodes.label: Engineering Studio — Module 5
nodes.rationale: Engineering lifecycle visualization across 8 phases with deliverables and customer touchpoints

nodes.label: Customer Workspace — Module 10
nodes.rationale: Simulated dashboard showing post-engagement client experience; framed as 'Mission Control' not 'Portal'

nodes.label: Knowledge Center — Module 11
nodes.rationale: Interactive encyclopedia not a blog; 7 topics with animated explanations and methodology

nodes.label: Success Story Explorer — Module 12
nodes.rationale: Structured engagement narratives (not testimonials); timeline format Challenge→Outcome

nodes.label: Virtual Security Assistant — Module 13
nodes.rationale: Embedded contextual guidance in each module; not a floating chatbot; contextually triggered hints

nodes.label: Design Principles: Professional, Technical, Modern, Structured
nodes.rationale: Enterprise software platform feel; trust, clarity, precision, control as four core characteristics
nodes.norm_label: design principles: professional, technical, modern, structured

nodes.label: Platform Evolution Strategy (5 Phases)
nodes.rationale: Marketing Website → Interactive Experience → Customer Collaboration → Cybersecurity Operations → Enterprise Security Intelligence

nodes.label: Enterprise Conversion Architecture: 6 Psychological Stages
nodes.rationale: Unaware→Aware→Exploring→Comparing→Confident→Engaged; consultation happens very late deliberately

nodes.label: Build Loop: Maker/Content/Stopslop/Reviewer/Checker/Resolver
nodes.rationale: Never advances on incomplete work; parallel execution with Reviewer auditing while Maker builds next

nodes.label: Delivery Model Explorer — Module 7
nodes.rationale: 5 engagement models with animation revealing team, timeline, reports, meetings, deliverables

nodes.label: Tech Stack: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Framer Motion, Zustand
nodes.rationale: All locked decisions: App Router only, strict TypeScript, Tailwind-only, shadcn primitives, Framer Motion, Zustand+sessionStorage, Geist font, lucide-react icons, Resend email, Vercel Analytics
nodes.norm_label: tech stack: next.js 15, typescript, tailwind, shadcn/ui, framer motion, zustand

nodes.label: File Map: 55+ Route Shells
nodes.rationale: Shell-first build ensures all routes exist from day one before any module is filled

nodes.label: 14 Frozen Module Definitions
nodes.rationale: Modules 1-14 fully specified; no deviations without explicit user approval

nodes.label: 13 JSON Data Schemas
nodes.rationale: All content stored as JSON: enterprise-map, maturity-stages, engagement-studio, capabilities, engineering-lifecycle, team-builder, delivery-models, attack-surface, knowledge, success-stories, assistant-hints, industries, solutions

nodes.label: 48 PRD Requirements Freeze Table
nodes.rationale: Numbered compliance checklist spanning all modules, pages, global concerns, and phases

nodes.label: Brand: Black #000000 + Red #DC2626 + White #FFFFFF
nodes.rationale: Locked color tokens; applied via CSS variables in globals.css

nodes.label: Mitigence Logo (SVG) — Complex brand mark with raster embed
nodes.norm_label: mitigence logo (svg) — complex brand mark with raster embed

nodes.label: Window Icon — Browser/app window with traffic lights (gray)
nodes.norm_label: window icon — browser/app window with traffic lights (gray)

nodes.label: Vercel Logo — White triangle on transparent
nodes.norm_label: vercel logo — white triangle on transparent
